# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Artifact Metadata (lifecycles)
# Covers: custom lifecycles list, invalid phase rejection.

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json -o out.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.lifecycles[] | select(.phase == "post-build")' out.json
exec jq -e '.metadata.lifecycles[] | select(.phase == "operations")' out.json

# Invalid phase rejected
! exec sbomasm generate sbom -c bad.yaml -i .components.json -o out_bad.json
stderr 'invalid lifecycle phase'

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
  lifecycles:
    - phase: post-build
    - phase: operations
-- bad.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
  lifecycles:
    - phase: not-a-real-phase
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "lib", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name": "a"},
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}]
    }
  ]
}
